text: ٣٥. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَنْ أَسْرَعَ إِلَى النَّاسِ بِمَا يَكْرَهُونَ، قَالُوا فِيهِ بِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 35. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: If someone is quick in saying about people what they dislike, they speak about him that about which they have no knowledge.
